query:
SELECT p.id as player_id, p.phone, p.nickname,
       pi.id as item_id, pi.itemName, pi.status, pi.source, pi.createdAt
FROM players p
LEFT JOIN playerItems pi ON pi.playerId = p.id
WHERE p.phone = '18526239983'
ORDER BY pi.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
